name: qa_manager_create_clash_report_from_detection_in_scope
desc: QA Manager workflow: run a clash detection sweep in the chosen scope (view | selection | filters | worksets) → optionally capture screenshots → export the clash report in any mix of excel/xml/html/pdf/word. Single-call workflow replacement for manually chaining RunClashDetection*Command + CaptureAllClashResultImages + ExportClashResults*.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: view | selection | filters | worksets — picks the RunClashDetection*Command variant. Default: view.

parameters.name: filter_a
parameters.description: Only for scope=filters. Name/regex of first filter.

parameters.name: filter_b
parameters.description: Only for scope=filters. Name/regex of second filter.

parameters.name: tolerance_mm
parameters.description: Optional tolerance override in mm for filter-pair sweeps.

parameters.name: formats
parameters.description: Comma-separated formats: excel, xml, html, pdf, word. Default: excel,xml,html.
